name: Charm Person
description: One humanoid sees you as a trusted ally until dispelled.

name: Detect Magic
description: You perceive enchantments and magic auras nearby for a short time.

name: Floating Disc
description: A levitating disc of force follows you, carrying heavy loads.

name: Hold Portal
description: A door or gate is magically held shut.

name: Light
description: An object glows like a torch, or blinds a target who fails a save.

name: Magic Missile
description: An unerring dart of force strikes for 1d6+1 damage.

name: Protection from Evil
description: A ward hampers enemy attacks and bars enchanted creatures.

name: Read Magic
description: You decipher magical writing and scrolls.

name: Sleep
description: Weak creatures in an area fall into magical slumber.

name: Ventriloquism
description: Your voice seems to issue from elsewhere.

name: Continual Light
description: A permanent, bright daylight glow, or blinding burst on a target.

name: Detect Invisible
description: You see invisible and hidden creatures and objects.

name: ESP
description: You read the surface thoughts of nearby creatures.

name: Invisibility
description: A creature or object becomes unseen until it attacks.

name: Knock
description: Locked, barred, or stuck doors and chests spring open.

name: Levitate
description: You move yourself vertically through the air by will.

name: Mirror Image
description: Illusory duplicates of you absorb incoming attacks.

name: Web
description: Sticky strands fill an area, entangling those within.

name: Dispel Magic
description: You end ongoing spells and magical effects in an area.

name: Fire Ball
description: A burst of flame deals damage to all in the area (save for half).

name: Fly
description: A creature gains the power of flight for a time.

name: Haste
description: Targets move and attack at double speed.

name: Hold Person
description: Humanoid targets are paralysed unless they save.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: A stroke of lightning blasts everything in a line (save for half).

name: Invisibility 10' Radius
description: You and nearby allies become invisible.

name: Cure Light Wounds
description: Heals 1d6+1 damage, or harms undead with reversed casting.

name: Detect Evil
description: You sense evil intent and cursed objects nearby.

name: Light (Cleric)
description: An object glows like a torch, or blinds a target who fails a save.

name: Protection from Evil (Cleric)
description: A ward hampers enemy attacks and bars enchanted creatures.

name: Purify Food and Water
description: Spoiled rations and tainted water are made wholesome.

name: Bless
description: Allies gain bonuses to attacks and morale (or a curse, reversed).

name: Find Traps
description: Nearby mechanical and magical traps are revealed.

name: Hold Person (Cleric)
description: Humanoid targets are paralysed unless they save.

name: Silence 15' Radius
description: An area is wrapped in total silence, foiling spellcasting.

name: Speak with Animals
description: You converse with natural beasts.

name: Cure Disease
description: You cure a creature of disease (or inflict one, reversed).

name: Remove Curse
description: You lift a curse from a creature or object (or bestow one).

name: Striking
description: A weapon deals extra magical damage for a time.
